opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head feels like it's being squeezed in a band of iron, and it just won't let up. I've taken paracetamol and ibuprofen and it's barely touched it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pressing headache has been building for about half a day, it's stopping me sleeping and I'm worried because the usual painkillers aren't working.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 12 hours ago, during a really stressful, tiring stretch at work
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for around 12 hours and it hasn't eased
symptom_narrative.character: a pressing, tightening, band-like squeezing feeling across both sides of my head — not a throbbing or pounding pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: moderate but really wearing and distressing because it won't stop; it's kept me awake
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both sides, like a tight band around my whole head, and my neck and shoulders feel tight and sore too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: steady and constant since it started rather than coming in waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much so far — the paracetamol and ibuprofen barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it doesn't get worse when I move around or climb stairs; stress and staring at my screen seem to feed it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit sensitive to loud noise, but bright light doesn't bother me and I don't feel sick or like I'm going to vomit
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had tight, stressy headaches before but this one has been more stubborn than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still do things but the pain and tiredness are really holding me back and I couldn't sleep

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, under high situational stress at work, long hours at a laptop with a lot of screen time

objective_data_offered.value: when I press on my temples and the muscles at the back of my neck and shoulders they feel tight and tender
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description of muscle tenderness, not a clinician examination
